zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Tattershall於1248年12月5日出生在英國英格蘭時，他的父親Robert de Tattershall IV26歲，母親Nichola21歲。他和Joan FitzRandolph至少有2個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1298年9月8日之前在他的家鄉。

nameMeanings.name: Tattershall
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Tattersall
meanings: English (Lancashire and west Yorkshire): habitational name from Tattershall in Lincolnshire, named from the Old English personal name Tāthere (genitive Tātheres) + Old English halh ‘nook, corner of land’.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Tattershall was born on 5 December 1248, in England, United Kingdom, his father, Robert de Tattershall IV, was 26 and his mother, Nichola, was 21. He had at least 2 sons and 1 daughter with Joan FitzRandolph. He died before 8 September 1298, in his hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Tattershall est né le 5 décembre 1248, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert de Tattershall IV, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Nichola, avait 21 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille avec Joan FitzRandolph. Il est décédé avant 8 septembre 1298, dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Tattershall am 5. Dezember 1248 in England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert de Tattershall IV 26 und seine Mutter Nichola 21. Er hatte mit Joan FitzRandolph mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb vor 8. September 1298 in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Tattershall è nato il il 5 dicembre 1248 nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Robert de Tattershall IV, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Nichola, aveva 21 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia con Joan FitzRandolph. Morì prima del 8 settembre 1298, nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Tattershallが1248年12月5日にイギリスイギリスで生まれた時，父Robert de Tattershall IVは26歳，母Nicholaは21歳であった。彼はJoan FitzRandolphとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1298年9月8日以前に故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Tattershall(이)가 1248년 12월 5일 영국 잉글랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Tattershall IV(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Nichola(은)는 21세였다. 그는 Joan FitzRandolph(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1298년 9월 8일 이전 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha com Joan FitzRandolph. Ele faleceu antes 8 de setembro de 1298, em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Tattershall родился 5 декабря 1248 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Robert de Tattershall IV было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Nichola, 21. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь от Joan FitzRandolph. Он умер перед 8 сентябрь 1298 г. в его родном городе.
